title: Fecal Pellet Composition
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"66s1b","text":"This protocol is used to measure the water content of mouse fecal pellets over 1 hour.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place mice in a clean cage and collect their fecal pellets produced over 1 hour.
Return mice to their home cage and weigh the fecal pellets (wet weight).
Desiccate the fecal pellets at 65oC for 19 hours then reweigh the fecal pellets (dry weight).
creator: Haley Geertsma
